visual: From cross hands, palms turn down and arms press slowly to the sides as feet bring together, returning to a neutral standing posture.
motion_description: The practitioner maintains a steady, shoulder-width parallel stance with the weight evenly distributed and the torso facing directly forward throughout the clip. Beginning with arms crossed in front of the chest and palms facing the body, the forearms rotate so the palms face outward and downward. Both arms are then pressed in a slow, continuous motion downward to the sides of the waist, concluding with a deliberate pause.
